registry.title: Backend Patterns Reference
registry.summary: CQRS patterns, repository usage, validation, entity patterns, DTO mapping, event handlers, message bus, migrations, background jobs, and authorization for Easy.Platform .NET 9 backend.
registry.whenToRead: Working on any C# backend code, CQRS commands/queries, entity design, or API endpoints

registry.title: Domain Entities Reference
registry.summary: Entity hierarchy, platform framework entities, PlatformExampleApp TextSnippet entities, value objects, relationships, DTO mapping, aggregate boundaries, and persistence summary.
registry.whenToRead: Creating or modifying entities, designing aggregates, or understanding domain model structure

registry.title: Code Review Rules
registry.summary: Critical rules, backend rules, frontend rules, architecture rules, anti-patterns, decision trees, and checklists for code review.
registry.whenToRead: Reviewing code, creating PRs, or auditing code quality

registry.title: Frontend Patterns Reference
registry.summary: Component base classes, state management (PlatformVmStore), forms, API services, subscription cleanup, styling conventions, directives/pipes, and standalone components for Angular frontend.
registry.whenToRead: Working on Angular components, stores, forms, API services, or frontend architecture

registry.title: SCSS Styling Guide
registry.summary: SCSS architecture, mixins & variables, BEM methodology, theming, responsive patterns, color palette, z-index scale, and Stylelint configuration.
registry.whenToRead: Writing or modifying SCSS styles, theming, responsive layouts, or BEM class naming

registry.title: Integration Test Reference
registry.summary: Test architecture, base classes, fixtures & factories, test helpers, configuration, service-specific setup, test data patterns, and cross-service testing for subcutaneous CQRS integration tests.
registry.whenToRead: Writing or debugging integration tests, setting up test fixtures, or testing CQRS commands

registry.title: E2E Test Reference
registry.summary: Playwright and Selenium/SpecFlow E2E architecture, page object pattern, wait/assertion patterns, test data fixtures, configuration, and BDD patterns.
registry.whenToRead: Writing or debugging E2E tests, creating page objects, or configuring test runners

registry.title: Project Structure Reference
registry.summary: Service architecture, infrastructure ports, project directory tree, tech stack, module codes, and startup scripts.
registry.whenToRead: Understanding project layout, finding files, checking ports, or onboarding

registry.title: Feature Docs Reference
registry.summary: App-to-service mapping, feature index, integration tests, persistence providers, directory structure, templates, conventions, and coverage gaps for PlatformExampleApp.
registry.whenToRead: Understanding business features, checking feature coverage, or creating feature documentation

registry.title: Design System Reference
registry.summary: Design system overview, app documentation map, design tokens, mixin inventory, theme configuration, component inventory, icon & asset library, and known discrepancies.
registry.whenToRead: Working on UI components, theming, design tokens, or visual consistency
